summary: MR Module Phase 1 Testing Complete - All features working. MR CRUD (create/edit/delete), Visual Aids deck and slide management, MR Reports page with activity summary all tested successfully. Fixed bug: process_slide_image function was using io.BytesIO but io module was not imported correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test MRs (UI_TEST_MR, TEST_MR John Doe) and Visual Aid decks during testing - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: MR Module Phase 1 fully tested. All backend APIs working: /api/mrs (CRUD), /api/visual-aids (deck CRUD + slides), /api/mr-reports, /api/public/states, /api/public/districts. Frontend pages: MR Management (/admin/mr-management), Visual Aids (/admin/visual-aids), MR Reports (/admin/mr-reports). Sidebar nav has 'MR / Rep' dropdown with all three pages.

bug_fixes_applied.process_slide_image function: Changed io.BytesIO to BytesIO since BytesIO is imported from io module directly, not the io module itself

features_tested.MR Management Page: PASS - Loads at /admin/mr-management with stats (Total MRs, Active) and table
features_tested.MR CRUD - Create: PASS - Add MR modal with name, phone, email, password, state (dropdown), districts (click to select badges), status
features_tested.MR CRUD - Edit: PASS - Edit existing MR with all fields pre-populated
features_tested.MR CRUD - Delete: PASS - Delete confirmation modal, removes MR from list
features_tested.Visual Aids Page: PASS - Loads at /admin/visual-aids with deck cards and stats (Total, Category, Subcategory, Custom)
features_tested.Visual Aids - Create Deck: PASS - Create deck with name, type (category/subcategory/custom), category, subcategory, description, status
features_tested.Visual Aids - Open Deck Detail: PASS - Shows slides grid with slide number, image, title, up/down reorder buttons, delete button
features_tested.Visual Aids - Upload Slide: PASS - Upload slide with optional title, image converts to WebP at 1200x900 max
features_tested.Visual Aids - Delete Slide: PASS - Delete button removes slide, updates deck slide count
features_tested.MR Reports Page: PASS - Loads at /admin/mr-reports with summary cards (Total MRs, Active MRs, Total Visits, States Covered)
features_tested.MR Reports - Territory Overview: PASS - Shows MR list with name, state, districts, status
features_tested.MR Reports - Activity Log: PASS - Shows 'No Activity Yet' placeholder when no MR visits recorded
features_tested.Sidebar Navigation: PASS - MR Module section with MR Management, Visual Aids, MR Reports links in collapsible dropdown
features_tested.Location API - States: PASS - GET /api/public/states returns Indian states list
features_tested.Location API - Districts: PASS - GET /api/public/districts/{state} returns districts for selected state
